Kochi.transport: Auto-rickshaws, Uber, Ola, and local ferries are convenient.
Kochi.weather: Tropical monsoon climate. Hot and humid in summers.
Kochi.safety: Generally safe, but beware of pickpockets in crowded areas.

Munnar.transport: Taxis or rented jeeps are best for sightseeing.
Munnar.weather: Cool and pleasant. Winters can get cold.
Munnar.safety: Drive carefully on winding mountain roads, especially during monsoons.

Ooty.weather: Cool throughout the year. Winters are very chilly.
Ooty.safety: Keep warm clothing handy and avoid late night travel on ghat roads.

Goa.transport: Rented scooters or bikes are the best way to get around.
Goa.weather: Tropical, hot and humid with heavy monsoons.
Goa.safety: Swim only in designated safe zones on beaches.

Jaipur.weather: Hot summers and cold winters. Very little rainfall.
Jaipur.safety: Beware of touts offering cheap shopping or hotel deals.

Wayanad.transport: Private cabs or rented vehicles are the best way to explore.
Wayanad.weather: Pleasant year-round, heavy rainfall in monsoon.
Wayanad.safety: Trekking during heavy monsoons can be slippery and risky.
